No Poverty.reason: Indirectly relates to pro-poor strategies (Target 1.b) through the core competence of understanding 'social responsibility' and 'sustainability considerations' in business.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops skills for employment like 'problem-solving' and 'decision-making' (Target 4.4).
evidence: 習得相關進階專業知識（Students will acquire and apply expertise in their respective fields.）
發現問題、解決問題與決策能力（Students will identify problems, develop and evaluate possible alternatives and make decisions.）

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Promotes 'innovative, entrepreneurial approaches' (Target 8.3) and 'social responsibility' in business, which supports higher economic productivity and decent work (Targets 8.2, 8.8).
evidence: 創新方法、創業態度與面對變革的能力（Students can demonstrate innovative, entrepreneurial approaches to manage change.）

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focuses on 'innovative approaches' and 'Business Analytics', which are key to upgrading industrial capabilities (Target 9.5) and making industries more sustainable (Target 9.4).
evidence: 創新方法、創業態度與面對變革的能力（Students can demonstrate innovative, entrepreneurial approaches to manage change.）

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Directly addresses 'sustainability considerations of business situations', aligning with encouraging companies to adopt sustainable practices and integrate sustainability information (Target 12.6).
evidence: 理解與辨別商業環境中道德、社會責任與永續議題

Climate Action.reason: The study of 'sustainability considerations' in business analytics can be inferred to include integrating climate change measures into business planning and decision-making (Target 13.2).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The core competence of understanding 'ethics' in business situations supports building accountable institutions and reducing corruption (Targets 16.6, 16.5).
